Product Creation Tools
Here is a selection of valuable, cost effective tools to help you in the
product creation process.
Teleseminars
Free Tools:
 Free Conference Calling
http://www.freeconferencecalling.com
o Free conferences up to 1,000 people
o Useful online conference management tool
o Downloadable MP3 recordings
 Free Conference Call
http://www.freeconferencecall.com
o Free conferences up to 250 people
o Online control panel
o Downloadable MP3 recordings
 Free Conference Pro
http://www.freeconferencepro.com
o Free conferences up to 200 people
o Customized welcome greetings
o Conference scheduler and MP3 recordings

2
© 2012 Internet Alchemy, Inc.

v.2
Paid Tools:
 Instant Teleseminar
http://InstantTeleseminar.com
Pricing: Free 21-day trial, monthly packages from $47 - $197
o Popular event marketing service
o 200 phone lines and 2,000 limit for webcast page
o Customizable pre, live, and post event pages
o One click recording
o Raised hands Q&A feature
o Multiple host access
o International calling
o Able to upload presentations
 Maestro Conference
http://www.maestroconference.com
Pricing: Free 30-day trial, monthly packages from $47 - $187
o Innovative conference platform up to 2,500 participants
o Ability to create breakout groups for targeted interaction
o Self registration option
o Skype integration
o Poll features
 Instant Conference
http://www.instantconference.com
Pricing: Range from free Basic version (10 participants) to
Professional version at $49.95/month (150 participants)
o Long established conference calling tool
o Simple web-based moderator tools
o Integrates with Outlook
o MP3 recordings

Webinars
 GoToWebinar.com (Most Popular)
Pricing: $99 - $499/month (100 – 1,000 participants)
o Mac and PC friendly
o Full service registration with customized branding and
images
o Automated reminder emails
o Audio conferencing via phone and computer
o Records full webinar
o Instantly change presenters
o Chat and survey capabilities
o Post event reports
 AnyMeeting.com
http://www.anymeeting.com
Pricing: Free version with ads and paid version starting at
$17.95/month.
o PC and Mac compatible
o Meet with up to 200 participants
o Screen sharing capabilities
o Video conferencing up to 6 people
o Offers full webinar recording
o Ability to interact with audience through polls and chat
o Paypal integration for delivering paid webinars

4
© 2012 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
All Rights Reserved.
v.2
 Join.me
http://join.me
Pricing: Free version, 14 day trial of paid version and a
$19/month pro version
Free version:
o Simple tool with no download required
o Screen sharing up to 250 viewers
o Chat features
o Ability to upload files
o Mobile friendly - iPhone/iPad or Android
Paid version:
o Ability to swap presenters
o Customized link and background
o Meeting scheduler
o User management tool
o International conference lines
Automated Webinar Tool
 Stealth Seminar
http://www.stealthseminar.com
Pricing: $97 one-time set-up fee and $69.95 per month
o Powerful tool for scheduling and automating your pre-
recorded webinars and teleseminars
o Variety of event templates and registration forms
o Ability to integrate call to action order buttons at the time
you choose
o Great stats tool that tracks when people leave your
webinar
 Evergreen Business System
http://www.evergreenbusinesssystem.com
Pricing: $497 (one time fee)

v.2
Market Research Tools
Alexa: Provides useful data on a website’s traffic levels, visitor
demographics, and search engine behavior.
Compete: Free version allows you to gather important website traffic
data and shows how you stack up against your competition.
Aboutus.org: Great resource for gathering basic competitor website
information and contact details.
DomainTools: Useful for finding technical data on a particular website
(i.e. host information).
Website Grader: Analyzes a website’s traffic levels, SEO results, and
social media reach.
Spyfu.net: Free version offers basic pay-per-click and organic search
data for a selected website.
SEMRush: Free version provides useful pay-per-click and organic
search information for a given website.
Market Samurai: Very popular keyword research tool that provides
excellent SEO competitor information.
Google Keyword Tool: Free, popular keyword research tool

Getting-It-Done Tools
Google Docs – Free document collaboration tool
Basecamp – Popular low-cost project management tool
Central Desktop – Robust project management tool
Skype – offers live text, video and audio chat as well as file and
screen sharing capabilties
Freeconferencecall.com – Free bridge line and phone recording tool
Drop Box – popular file storage and sharing tool
